word: H6890 - צֶרֶת הַשַּׁחַר - Tsereth hash-Shachar - tseh'-reth hash-shakh'-ar - Zareth-shahar

sections.paragraph:
Original: צרת השּׁחר

Transliteration: tsereth hashshachar

Phonetic: tseh'-reth hash-shakh'-ar

BDB Definition:

Zareth-shahar = "splendour of the dawn"
  1. a town in Reuben

Origin: from the same as H6889 and H7837 with the article interposed

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
